query: intentional camera movement abstract blur swirl impressionistic photo
message: sub:intentional_blur/ICM_abstract — anti_aesthetic — swirl, zoom blur, vertical pan, painterly motion abstraction

response.objective_caption: A tight, centered composition of purple and magenta flowers with green foliage, rendered as streaking radial lines emanating from a small focal point at the center where some flower buds and leaves remain slightly more defined.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A tight, centered composition of purple and magenta flowers with green foliage subjected to an extreme intentional zoom-blur effect, with streaking radial lines emanating from a small focal point at the center, abstracting the botanical subject into pure color, motion, and texture so that individual flowers and leaves dissolve into dynamic magenta, purple, and green streaks.
